debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
hn_small : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑m < δ

proof:
have hmn : (m : ℝ) ≥ n := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmpos : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hle : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hconst : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [le_of_lt hab]
    exact (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hconst (by exact_mod_cast npos) hmn)
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small
failed_attempts:
have : (2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ)) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    gcongr
    exact_mod_cast hnm
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn_small

have hmn : (n : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hle : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hpos : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a) := by linarith [hab]
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos hmn
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small

have hn' : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < n := lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)
  have hmn' : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < m := lt_of_lt_of_le hn' (by exact_mod_cast hnm)
  have hδ' : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by bound
  have hpos : 0 < 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hδpos : 0 < δ := by linarith [hδ']
  have hm : (2 * (b - a)) / m < δ := by
    have : (2 * (b - a)) / δ < (m : ℝ) := by
      have := (one_div_lt (by exact hδ')).1 hmn'
      simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
    have : (2 * (b - a)) / m < δ := by
      have hm0 : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
      have hδ0 : (0 : ℝ) < δ := hδpos
      have := (div_lt_iff hm0).2 ((mul_lt_mul_right hm0).1 ?_)
      · simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
      · have := (div_lt_iff hδ0).2 (by simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this)
        simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
    exact this
  simpa [Nat.cast_id] using hm

have hnm' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by linarith [hab]
  have hle : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / n := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos.le hnm'
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small

have hn' : (↑N : ℝ) ≤ (↑n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hnm' : (↑n : ℝ) ≤ (↑m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hNpos : (0 : ℝ) < (↑N : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast Npos
  have hnpos' : (0 : ℝ) < (↑n : ℝ) := lt_of_lt_of_le hNpos hn'
  have hmpos' : (0 : ℝ) < (↑m : ℝ) := lt_of_lt_of_le hnpos' hnm'
  have hdiv : 2 * (b - a) / (↑m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (↑n : ℝ) := by
    have : (1 / (↑m : ℝ)) ≤ (1 / (↑n : ℝ)) := by
      exact one_div_le_one_div_of_le hnpos' hnm'
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left this (by bound)
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv hn_small

have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have h₁ : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / n := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos (by exact_mod_cast npos.le) hn'
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt h₁ hn_small

have hn' : (↑n : ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hnm' : (↑m : ℝ) ≥ (↑n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmN : (↑m : ℝ) ≥ N := le_trans hn' (le_trans (le_of_eq rfl) (le_trans (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_lt_of_le (by linarith) (le_of_lt hab)) (by linarith)) (by linarith))) hnm'))
  have hNδ : N > 2 * (b - a) / δ := by
    have hN' : (↑N : ℝ) > 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := by
      exact_mod_cast hN
    simpa [one_div, div_div, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hN'
  have hmδ : (↑m : ℝ) > 2 * (b - a) / δ := lt_of_lt_of_le hNδ hmN
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hδpos : 0 < δ := hδ₁
  have : 2 * (b - a) / (↑m : ℝ) < δ := by
    have hmpos : 0 < (↑m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast mpos
    have : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / δ < (↑m : ℝ) := by
      exact hmδ
    have := (div_lt_iff hmpos).2 (by
      have := (lt_div_iff hδpos).1 this
      nlinarith)
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using this
  simpa using this

have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmposR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hle : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have : (1 / (m : ℝ)) ≤ 1 / (n : ℝ) := by
      exact one_div_le_one_div_of_le (by exact_mod_cast npos) hn'
    nlinarith
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small

have hn_le_m : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : (0 : ℝ) < 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hm_le : 2 * (b - a) / m ≤ 2 * (b - a) / n := by
    have hnpos : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
    have hmpos : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
    exact (div_le_div_left hpos).2 (by
      simpa [div_eq_mul_inv] using (inv_le_inv_of_le hnpos hn_le_m))
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hm_le hn_small

have hm' : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / n := by
    gcongr
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hm' hn_small

have hmn : (m : ℝ) ≥ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hle : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.cast_le.2 hnm))
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small

have hnR : (↑n : ℝ) ≤ ↑m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / ↑m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / ↑n := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos.le hnR
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn_small

have hnm' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hnposR : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hmono : (2 * (b - a)) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (b - a)) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have : (1 : ℝ) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (1 : ℝ) / (n : ℝ) := by
      exact one_div_le_one_div_of_le hnposR hnm'
    nlinarith
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hmono hn_small

have hmn : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hdiv : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / n := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos hmn
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_trans hdiv (le_of_lt hn_small)) hn_small

have : (m : ℝ) ≥ n := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmposR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hnposR : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hmn : (2 * (b - a)) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (b - a)) / (n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (by bound) hmposR.le hnposR.le this
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hmn hn_small

have hn_le_m : (n : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hfrac : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / (n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos hn_le_m
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hfrac hn_small

have hn_le_m : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hfrac_le : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hba : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [le_of_lt hab]
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hba hn_le_m
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hfrac_le hn_small

have hn' : (↑n : ℝ) ≤ (↑m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hmle : 2 * (b - a) / (↑m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (↑n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos (by exact hn')
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hmle hn_small

have hn' : (↑n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hm' : 0 < (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hnpos' : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hdiv : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hmono := (div_le_div_left (show 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) by nlinarith [hab])).2 hn'
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hmono
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv hn_small

have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hdiv : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hnposR : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
    have hmposR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
    have hrecip : (1 : ℝ) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 1 / (n : ℝ) := by
      exact (one_div_le_one_div_of_le hnposR hn')
    simpa [div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
      mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hrecip (by linarith [hab])
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv hn_small

have hn' : (↑n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hm' : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hmono : 2 * (b - a) / (↑m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (↑n : ℝ) := by
    have hba : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [le_of_lt hab]
    exact (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hba hn').trans_eq (by ring_nf)
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hmono hn_small

have hnR : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmposR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hnposR : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hdiv : (2 * (b - a)) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (b - a)) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have : (1 / (m : ℝ)) ≤ 1 / (n : ℝ) := by
      exact one_div_le_one_div_of_le hnposR hnR
    nlinarith
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv hn_small

have hmn' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hdiv : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / n := by
    exact (div_le_div_left hpos).2 hmn'
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv hn_small

have hnm' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / m ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / n := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos (by exact_mod_cast npos) hnm'
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn_small

have hn' : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hmposR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hle : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have : (1 / (m : ℝ)) ≤ 1 / (n : ℝ) := by
      exact one_div_le_one_div_of_le hmposR hn'
    nlinarith
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small

have hn' : (↑N : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hnm' : (n : ℕ) ≤ m := hnm
  have hnmR : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm'
  have hm_ge_N : (↑N : ℝ) ≤ m := le_trans hn' hnmR
  have hNposR' : (0 : ℝ) < N := by exact_mod_cast Npos
  have hmposR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hdiv_le : 2 * (b - a) / (↑m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (↑n : ℝ) := by
    have hba : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [le_of_lt hab]
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hba hnmR
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv_le hn_small

have hnR : (N : ℝ) ≤ n := by exact_mod_cast hn
  have hnmR : (n : ℝ) ≤ m := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hm_ge_N : (N : ℝ) ≤ m := le_trans hnR hnmR
  have hn_posR : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hm_posR : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have habR : (0 : ℝ) < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
  have htwo : (0 : ℝ) < (2:ℝ) := by norm_num
  have hnum_pos : (0 : ℝ) < 2 * (b - a) := mul_pos htwo habR
  have hdiv_le : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (le_of_lt hnum_pos) hnmR
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_trans hdiv_le (le_of_lt hn_small)) hn_small

have hn' : (1 : ℝ) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < n := lt_of_lt_of_le hN (by exact_mod_cast hn)
  have hnδ : (2 * (b - a)) / n < δ := by
    have hpos : 0 < δ / (2 * (b - a)) := by
      have hbapos : 0 < b - a := by linarith
      have hdenpos : 0 < 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith
      exact div_pos hδ₁ hdenpos
    have h := (one_div_lt (a := δ / (2 * (b - a))) hpos).1 hn'
    simpa [one_div, div_eq_mul_inv, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using h
  have hmn : (m : ℝ) ≥ n := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hle : (2 * (b - a)) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (b - a)) / (n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (le_of_lt hpos) hmn
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hnδ

have hmn' : (m : ℝ) ≥ (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmpos' : 0 < (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hnpos' : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast npos
  have hdiv : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    by_cases hba : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a)
    · exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hba hnpos' hmn'
    · have hneg : 2 * (b - a) ≤ 0 := le_of_not_ge hba
      have : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
        exact div_le_div_of_nonpos_left hneg hnpos' hmn'
      exact this
  have hn_small' : 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) < δ := by simpa using hn_small
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hdiv hn_small'

have hm_le : (m : ℝ) ≥ n := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hpos : 0 < (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by nlinarith [hab]
  have hfrac_le : (2 * (b - a)) / (m : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (b - a)) / (n : ℝ) := by
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos (by exact_mod_cast npos) hm_le
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt (hfrac_le.trans (le_of_lt hn_small)) hn_small

have : (2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ)) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hmn : (n : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hnm
    have hpos : 0 ≤ (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) := by linarith [hab.le]
    exact div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hpos hmn
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt this hn_small
successful_attempts:
have hmn : (m : ℝ) ≥ n := by exact_mod_cast hnm
  have hmpos : (0 : ℝ) < m := by exact_mod_cast mpos
  have hle : 2 * (b - a) / (m : ℝ) ≤ 2 * (b - a) / (n : ℝ) := by
    have hconst : 0 ≤ 2 * (b - a) := by nlinarith [le_of_lt hab]
    exact (div_le_div_of_nonneg_left hconst (by exact_mod_cast npos) hmn)
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt hle hn_small
